alerts.headline: 📉 RSI DEEPLY OVERSOLD: Gold RSI at 16.6 — extreme mean-reversion buy signal
alerts.detail: RSI below 30 is a strong historical buy signal for gold. Current RSI: 16.6

alerts.headline: ⚠️ BELOW 50-DAY MA: Gold at $4,402 trading under 50-DMA ($4,635) — watch for support

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 17.2% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
